description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND a free user is logged in

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects a not entitled game tile
AND navigates to the [Get MLB.TV] button
steps.result:
THEN the Feed Modal displays
AND the following statement is spoken, "<away_team> @ <home_team>, Recap, press select to watch a recap of the game, press back to dismiss."
AND on focus of the [Get MLB.TV] button the following statement is spoken, "Get MLB.TV, You are not entitled to this game, Press select to view subscription options, Press back to dismiss."
